reviews.comment:
Mucho más q una estación de servicio. ALTOS sandwiches. Y buena morfi, tarta, lomitos... de primera, parada obligatoria

(Translated by Google)
Much more than a gas station. GREAT sandwiches. And good food, cake, and tenderloins... top-notch, a must-stop.

reviews.comment:
